main.description: Exchange a delegation token for a space credential. A client attestation is also required when the space gates on client app identity. Implemented by a space host.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

delegationToken.description: Delegation token (JWT) minted by the requesting user's PDS via com.atproto.space.getDelegationToken.

clientAttestation.description: Client attestation (JWT) signed by the application's own client authentication key. Required only when the space gates on client app identity.

credential.description: Space credential (JWT) signed by the space authority's signing key.

errors.name: AttestationRequired
errors.description: The space gates on client app identity and no client attestation was provided.

errors.name: NotAuthorized
errors.description: The authority declined to authorize the requesting user.

errors.name: ClientNotAuthorized
errors.description: The authority declined to authorize the requesting client application.
